wisqars_deaths_{variant}.long_description: Number of deaths attributed to {variant} by year and strata. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed
wisqars_deaths_{variant}.restrictions: WISQARS Data Use Agreement. The data source for WISQARS Fatal Injury Data is the National Vital Statistics System (NVSS) operated by the National Center for Health Statistics. WISQARS provides death counts and death rates for the United States and by state, county, age, race, Hispanic ethnicity, sex, leading cause of death, injury intent, and injury mechanism categories. WISQARS can be used to query death data for the years 2001 - 2021, of which the underlying cause of death is specified using ICD-10 codes. The National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) in an agreement with the National Association of Public Health Statistics and Information Systems (NAPHSIS) has implemented a new, more restrictive rule for reporting state- and county-level death data for years 2008 and later from NVSS in order to avoid inadvertent disclosure of a decedent's identity. Therefore, the Data Analytics Branch, Division of Injury Prevention, NCIPC has modified WISQARS to accommodate the new data suppression rule; i.e., no figure, including totals, should be less than 10 in tabulations for sub-national geographic areas, regardless of the number of years combined with the 2008 and later data. Tabulations, charts, and maps produced by WISQARS using only NVSS death data for years prior to 2008 are not affected by this new rule. Therefore, queries of state-level data for years 1999 through 2007 will remain unrestricted; queries of state-level data that include 2008 or later are restricted.

transport_other_excl_drown_by_water_tran.short_name: Transport-related, overall, excluding drowning by water transport

wisqars_rate_{variant}.long_description: Rate of deaths attributed to {variant} by year and strata. Rates based on fewer than 10 deaths are suppressed
wisqars_rate_{variant}.statement: The rate of death due to {variant} was {value} per 100,000 people
wisqars_rate_{variant}.restrictions: WISQARS Data Use Agreement. wisqars_nchs.name: Web-based Injury Statistics Query and Reporting System (WISQARS™)
wisqars_nchs.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, National Center for Health Statistics
wisqars_nchs.description: CDC's Web-based Injury Statistics Query and Reporting System (WISQARS™) is an interactive, online source of injury data. Users can access information on fatal and nonfatal injury, cost of injury, and data about social determinants of health related to injury. Data on more than 20 causes of injury among different populations and geographic locations can be explored in WISQARS™. PopHIVE uses data from the fatal injury reports, with the data coming from the National Center for Health Statistics-CDC annual mortality data files.

wisqars_nvrds.name: Web-based Injury Statistics Query and Reporting System (WISQARS™)
wisqars_nvrds.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, National Center for Injury Prevention and Control
wisqars_nvrds.description: CDC's Web-based Injury Statistics Query and Reporting System (WISQARS™) is an interactive, online source of injury data. Users can access information on fatal and nonfatal injury, cost of injury, and data about social determinants of health related to injury. Data on more than 20 causes of injury among different populations and geographic locations can be explored in WISQARS™. PopHIVE also has some mortality data from the National Violent Death Reporting System, Data Analytics Branch, National Center for Injury Prevention and Control, CDC.
